task_definition: Compare the source prompt with the migrated prompt on the same user jobs.

cases.expected: Produces the required artifact with all named constraints.

cases.prompt: Handle an ambiguous request with missing model details.
cases.expected: States a bounded assumption or requests the missing decision.
Rejects or replaces the parameter without inventing support.

stopping_rules: Stop after three complete runs per case.
Stop early if a required safety boundary fails.
